SDD Navigator

Summary

Failed to load stats: Route / with `dynamic = "error"` couldn't be rendered statically because it used `revalidate: 0 fetch http://localhost:4010/stats /`. See more info here: https://nextjs.org/docs/app/building-your-application/rendering/static-and-dynamic#dynamic-rendering

Orphans

Orphans are annotations/tasks referencing unknown requirement IDs.
